scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron .
scripts.electron:build: NEXT_PUBLIC_OWNER_MODE= npm run build && npm run electron:compile && node scripts/prepare-electron.mjs && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: NEXT_PUBLIC_OWNER_MODE= npm run build && npm run electron:compile && node scripts/prepare-electron.mjs && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:owner: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && node scripts/prepare-electron.mjs && electron-builder --mac -c.appId=com.talky.owner -c.productName='Talky Owner' -c.artifactName=Talky-Owner.dmg -c.dmg.artifactName=Talky-Owner.dmg -c.mac.icon=build/icon-owner.icns
